localized_texts.text: Wild Wild Wet

Visit Wild Wild Wet, one of Singapore's largest water parks, located in Downtown East. This unique water park is one of the most popular attractions near downtown Singapore and was voted 5th in the Top 10 Water Parks in Asia category during the TripAdvisor Travelers' Choice awards in 2020.
Free Fall: Asia's Longest Water Slides. Take the plunge down a near-vertical drop.
Jacuzzi Pool & Spa in Water Park: Fluid jets to rub and ease the kinks in your muscles plus a bubbly massage that soothes your aches.
Kidz Zone: Water Park for Children. Exhilarating pint-sized versions of the big rides.
Kraken Racers: Mat Racer Water Slide. Singapore's first four-lane mat racer slide.
Water Park Rides & Attractions
- Free Fall: Asia's Longest Water Slides. Take the plunge down a near-vertical drop.
- Jacuzzi Pool & Spa in Water Park: Fluid jets to rub and ease the kinks in your muscles plus a bubbly massage that soothes your aches.
- Kidz Zone: Water Park for Children. Exhilarating pint-sized versions of the big rides.
- Kraken Racers: Mat Racer Water Slide. Singapore's first four-lane mat racer slide.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Wild Wild Wet official website for any updates of operation hours.
Weather: If attractions remain closed beyond 90 minutes due to inclement weather, we will revalidate tickets for use within the next 60 days.
Restrictions: Please kindly visit Wild Wild Wet official website for age and height restrictions for the various rides and attractions.
Dresscode: Appropriate swimwear recommended.
Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible.
What’s included: [2026 Summer Wave] General Admission - Peak
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Please present QR Code ticket directly at Wild Wild Wet entrance
How to use: All guests are to be present at the point of entry.

Terms & Conditions: Day Pass (Off Peak) is valid for one time use only and must be used on the visit date selected that are falling on Mondays to Fridays 12pm to 6pm, closed on Tuesday, last admission will be at 5pm daily. EXCLUDING the Singapore Gazetted Public and School Holidays stated. The Management reserves the right, at our absolute discretion, to deny entry to the park or any attractions to any person, without refund or compensation if failure to comply with all of the above. Adult: Age 13 to 54 years old Child: Age 3 to 12 years old Senior: 55 years old and above *Infant enters to Wild Wild Wet for FREE! Rain Code Policy If attractions remain closed for more than 90 minutes due to inclement weather, Wild Wild Wet will revalidate tickets (return visit vouchers) for use within the next 60 days. Please refer to the following link for more details: https://www.wildwildwet.com/visitor-information/guest-services. The conditions of entry that guest accept, observe and be bound by the following terms and conditions upon entry into Wild Wild Wet: Operating hours and ticket prices are subject to change at the Management's discretion. Day Passes issued are only valid on the correct visit date selected, with unlimited access during the operating hours. Day Passes are non-refundable, non-transferable, non-exchangeable for cash and cannot be resold. Park may be closed for corporate/private events and there will be no sales of Day Pass and admission. Operation of the slides and pools are subject to change, delay, suspension or closure due to bad weather, preventive maintenance, refurbishment or other safety and operational requirements. Use of floats, life-jackets & locker rentals are on a “first come, first served” basis. Photography and/or videography will be carried out at Wild Wild Wet for publicity purposes. By entering this area, you are consenting to have photos and videos containing you and your voice to be taken. Wild Wild Wet premises area monitored by CCTV surveillance. The Management shall not be liable to you for any direct, indirect and/or consequential losses, damages, injuries suffered by park guests within Wild Wild Wet premises, arising from any acts or omissions of Wild Wild Wet, its staff and/or its other park guests whether those acts or omissions are negligent or otherwise. The Management reserves the right, at our absolute discretion, to deny entry to the park or any attractions to any person or to require a person already admitted to leave the park or any ride, without refund or compensation, in circumstances such as failure to comply with the park rules, illegal, unsafe or offensive conduct or in other circumstances that we at our sole discretion deem necessary. The Management reserves the right to amend these Terms and Conditions of Entry without prior notice. Guest shall: Observe the dress code (modest swimwear or shorts and T-shirts) at all times for safety purpose. All swimming attire should be free of zippers, rivets, buttons, or other hard objects. Swim diapers are required for children. Guest shall NOT: Smoke in the park area, inclusive of the pools, slides and queue lines. Bring pets or animals into Wild Wild Wet. Only guide dogs are permitted into the park. Consume alcohol in slides and pools. Bring or consume food and drinks purchased or prepared outside Wild Wild Wet. Engage in commercial filming or photography without the Management's approval. Tamper with any of the rides, slides, equipment, facilities or fixtures.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
How to use: Please present QR Code ticket directly at Wild Wild Wet entrance.
How to use: Top up will be required at the ticketing counter before entry if the visit date falls on the Peak Date, subject to capacity limit and approval.
What’s included: Wild Wild Wet Day Pass (Peak) Admission Ticket
